get.description: Issue or rotate the browser CSRF cookie used for double-submit protection.

post.description:
Authenticate user and return JWT tokens

Args:
    user_credentials: Username and password
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    JWT access token, refresh token, and user information
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If credentials are invalid

Get new access token using refresh token

Args:
    request: Refresh token request containing refresh_token
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    New access token
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If refresh token is invalid

Logout current user
Note: In a stateless JWT system, logout is handled on the client side
by discarding the tokens. This endpoint serves as a confirmation.
If no token is provided, returns a generic success message.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user (optional)
    
Returns:
    Success response

get.description:
Get current authenticated user information

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    Current user information

post.description:
Verify if a token is valid

Args:
    request: Token verification request containing token
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    Token validity confirmation

get.description:
Get paginated list of all users (Admin only)

Args:
    page: Page number (1-based)
    size: Number of items per page
    search: Search term for username, email, or full name
    role: Filter by user role
    is_active: Filter by active status
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Paginated list of users

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by username, email, or full name
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by username, email, or full name

post.description:
Create new user (Admin only)

Args:
    user_data: User creation data
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Created user information
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If username or email already exists

get.description:
Get user by ID (Admin only)

Args:
    user_id: User ID
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    User information
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found

put.description:
Update user (Admin only)

Args:
    user_id: User ID to update
    user_data: User update data
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Updated user information
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found or email already exists

delete.description:
Delete user (Admin only)

Args:
    user_id: User ID to delete
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Success response
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found or trying to delete themselves

post.description:
Activate user account (Admin only)

Args:
    user_id: User ID to activate
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Success response
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found

Deactivate user account (Admin only)

Args:
    user_id: User ID to deactivate
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin user
    
Returns:
    Success response
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found or trying to deactivate themselves

get.description:
Get paginated list of rules with role-based filtering

Role-based visibility:
- Admin: See all rules
- Department Head: See all approved + pending + rejected rules
- User: See approved rules + own rules (any status)

Args:
    page: Page number (1-based)
    size: Number of items per page
    search: Search term for name or description
    status: Filter by rule status
    created_by: Filter by creator ID
    severity: Filter by severity level
    is_active: Filter by active status (default: True)
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    Paginated list of rules

put.description:
Approve rule (Admin or Department Head only)
Changes status from pending_approval to approved

Args:
    rule_id: Rule ID
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin or department head user
    
Returns:
    Approved rule

Reject rule (Admin or Department Head only)
Changes status from pending_approval to rejected
Requires rejection_reason

Args:
    rule_id: Rule ID
    approval_data: Approval data with rejection reason
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current admin or department head user
    
Returns:
    Rejected rule

Resubmit rejected rule for approval
Only creator can resubmit
Changes status from rejected to pending_approval

Args:
    rule_id: Rule ID
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    Rule with pending_approval status

    Sync summary with updated forms

Get all extracted fields for a specific form
Used for review and verification

post.description:
Verify all extracted fields for a form at once
Accepts a dictionary of field_id -> verified_value mappings

Args:
    dossier_id: Dossier ID
    form_id: DossierForm ID
    verification_data: {"fields": {field_id: verified_value, ...}} or {field_id: verified_value, ...}
    db: Database session

Returns:
    Summary of verified fields

put.description:
Verify and optionally correct an extracted field value

Args:
    dossier_id: Dossier ID

    field_id: ExtractedField ID

    db: Database session
    current_user: Current authenticated user
    
Returns:
    Updated field data

Human-in-the-loop: user có thể sửa AI summary để cải thiện Dossier Knowledge.

post.description:
Gửi lại job tạo summary cho một file trong Pool.
Chỉ chạy khi file đã có markdown_content usable.

Gửi lại job tạo summary cho toàn bộ file trong Pool có markdown usable.
Các file đang có job summarize active sẽ reuse job cũ, không enqueue trùng.

Chuyển đổi lại file trong Pool (re-submit to DocProcess).
Dùng khi file chuyển đổi bị lỗi hoặc cần chuyển đổi lại.

get.description: Lấy thông tin preview của file (PDF path + Markdown content).
Serve raw file content for preview

get.summary: Get Pool File Content By Name
get.description:
Resolve a pool file by its `original_name` and serve raw content for preview.

Used by the validation-results panel where the LLM only knows file basename
(e.g. "Invoice_5595.pdf") and not the numeric pool_file_id. Falls back to a
case-insensitive match if the exact name is not found.
Serve raw file content for assigned form

Server-Sent Events stream cho pool file status updates.
FE kết nối 1 lần, backend push event khi file ready/error/summary.
EventSource xac thuc bang session cookie thay vi token query param.

post.description:
Cập nhật link giữa Rule và Templates trong Dossier.
Update scope_mapping trong bảng dossier_rules.
Trigger extraction for a SINGLE assigned form in dossier.

Trigger extraction for all forms in dossier that have markdown content.
Gửi markdown content + template fields qua LLM để trích xuất dữ liệu.

Global Extraction: Trích xuất dữ liệu cho TẤT CẢ templates trên canvas.
- use_agent_mode=false (default): Context Stuffing - gộp toàn bộ file vào context.
- use_agent_mode=true: Agent Routing - AI dùng Dossier Knowledge để chọn file phù hợp.

Run full assessment flow:
1. Wait for all pool files to be converted (ready status)
2. Run global extraction
3. Run validation (assessment)

Run rules validation for Visual Builder with template scoping.
Rules connected to specific templates only validate against those templates.
Unconnected rules validate globally against all templates.

get.description:
Lấy kết quả extraction cho form cụ thể

Args:
    dossier_id: ID của dossier
    form_id: ID của dossier form
    db: Database session
    
Returns:
    Kết quả extraction

put.description: Cập nhật kết quả extraction (Save changes)

post.description: Test extraction trên template markdown content
Upload template file cho form template và convert PDF to Markdown

🚀 API xử lý toàn trình hồ sơ thẩm định.

**Flow tự động:**
1. Tiếp nhận files → Upload vào Pool
2. Chuyển đổi PDF → Markdown (DocProcess)
3. Trích xuất dữ liệu tự động (LLM Global Extract)
4. Kiểm tra quy tắc thẩm định (Rule Engine)
5. Trả kết quả qua webhook hoặc polling

**Xác thực:** API Key qua header `X-Api-Key`

**Yêu cầu:** Dossier phải được tạo trước với templates + rules đã cấu hình.

get.description:
📊 Kiểm tra trạng thái tác vụ pipeline.

Sử dụng endpoint này để polling kết quả khi không dùng webhook.
📋 Danh sách tác vụ pipeline của user.
🔐 Admin: Xem tất cả pipeline tasks (JWT auth, có phân trang).

post.description:
